query:
SELECT
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions WHERE contentText = 'Columbus\n4') AS leaked_subs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions) AS total_subs,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books WHERE title LIKE '\\_\\_vitest%' ESCAPE '\\\\') AS leaked_books,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM books) AS total_books;
